I am currently pursuing my **B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering** at **Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)**. I enjoy building web applications, solving DSA problems, and continuously learning modern technologies.

## 🚀 About Me

- 🌍 Based in **Kerala, India**
- ✉️ Reach me at **parthivxx1@gmail.com**
